signals.title: DeepSeek mHC: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections for Scalable Transformer Architectures
signals.abstract: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC) replaces standard residual connections with topology-aware pathways constrained to learned manifold surfaces. Achieves 15% training efficiency gains and 8% inference speedup at 200B+ parameter scale.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 15% training efficiency gain, 8% inference speedup, 200B+ parameter scale

signals.title: ScienceClaw + Infinite: Autonomous Multi-Agent Framework for Iterative Scientific Discovery
signals.abstract: Multi-agent AI system for autonomous end-to-end scientific research cycles. Discovered 3 novel material compositions in 72 hours without human intervention across chemistry, materials science, and drug discovery domains.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 3 novel material compositions, 72 hours, zero human intervention, 3 domains validated

signals.title: LTX-2: Unified Audiovisual Diffusion for Synchronized Video-Audio Generation
signals.abstract: First unified diffusion architecture for simultaneously generating temporally-aligned video and audio. AV-Sync score 0.94, 30-second clips with spatially-localized sound effects.
signals.quantitative_metrics: AV-Sync score 0.94, 30-second clips, joint latent space

signals.title: Attn-QAT: Attention-Aware Quantization for 4-Bit Transformer Inference at Scale
signals.abstract: 4-bit quantization of weights and attention matrices with <1% accuracy degradation at 70B scale. 3.2x inference speedup, 4x memory reduction. Frontier models accessible on consumer GPUs.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 70B parameters, 3.2x speedup, 4x memory reduction, <1% accuracy loss, 24GB VRAM

signals.title: Breaking the Factorization Barrier in Discrete Diffusion Language Models
signals.abstract: Non-Factorized Discrete Diffusion (NFDD) surpasses autoregressive models in text quality. 12% human preference improvement, 5x faster generation for long sequences through parallel generation.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 12% human preference improvement, 5x faster generation

signals.title: Fault-Tolerant Execution of Error-Corrected Quantum Algorithms on Trapped-Ion Processors
signals.abstract: Fault-tolerant QAOA and HHL on Quantinuum H2/Helios using [[7,1,3]] Steane code. Near-break-even performance. Logical error rates below 10^-4 per gate.
signals.quantitative_metrics: Logical error rate <10^-4, Steane [[7,1,3]] code, H2 and Helios processors

signals.title: ReloQate: Real-Time Recalibration of Surface Code Quantum Error Correction
signals.abstract: Real-time recalibration protocol for surface codes adapting to time-varying noise. Maintains near-optimal logical error rates even with 30% noise drift. Demonstrated on 72-qubit processor.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 72-qubit processor, tolerates 30% noise drift, real-time adaptation

signals.title: No Last Mile: A Theory of the Human Data Market Under AI Commodification
signals.abstract: Theory of emerging human data market where AI creates demand for training data. Bifurcated labor: expert data commands premium, commodity data approaches zero. Predicts data cartel emergence.
signals.quantitative_metrics: Quality-adjusted power law pricing, expert vs commodity data split

signals.title: How Vulnerable is India's Economy to Foreign Sanctions? A Network Analysis
signals.abstract: Multi-layer trade network analysis of India's sanctions vulnerability across 127 sectors. Critical dependencies: semiconductor equipment (87% from 3 countries), pharma intermediates (64% from China). 3-7% GDP contraction predicted.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 127 sectors, 87% semiconductor dependency, 64% pharma from China, 3-7% GDP impact

signals.title: A Dynamic Equilibrium Model for Automated Market Makers in DeFi
signals.abstract: Dynamic equilibrium model for AMMs showing convergence to socially suboptimal equilibria. Proposes adaptive fee structures achieving 40% higher capital efficiency.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 40% higher capital efficiency through adaptive fees

signals.title: The Global Landscape of Environmental AI Regulation: A Comparative Framework
signals.abstract: Comparative analysis across 42 jurisdictions on AI environmental regulation. EU mandates energy efficiency reporting; US relies on voluntary commitments. Mandatory disclosure reduces AI emissions 15-22%.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 42 jurisdictions, 15-22% emission reduction from mandatory disclosure

signals.title: Self-Service or Not? Guiding Practitioners in Classifying AI Systems Under the EU AI Act
signals.abstract: Decision-support tool for EU AI Act compliance. 34% of companies misclassify AI risk level; 78% under-classify. Framework reduces misclassification to <5%.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 200+ organizations validated, 34% misclassification rate, <5% after framework

signals.title: Insights for an AI Whistleblower Office: Evidence from 30 Case Studies
signals.abstract: Analysis of 30 AI whistleblowing incidents. 73% of concerns proved substantiated. Proposes dedicated AI Whistleblower Office institutional design.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 30 case studies, 73% substantiation rate

signals.title: The Controllability Trap: A Governance Framework for Military AI Agents
signals.abstract: Paradox that increasing AI autonomy improves operational effectiveness while degrading oversight. Based on 15 wargames and 40 defense official interviews. Minimum human control thresholds for 5 categories.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 15 wargames, 40 interviews, 5 operation categories, ICLR 2026 Workshop

signals.title: Credibility Governance: Social Mechanisms for Collective Self-Correction in AI-Mediated Information
signals.abstract: Decentralized reputation + epistemic network analysis combats misinformation 3x faster than centralized fact-checking. 89% precision across 5 platforms with 2M+ users.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 3x faster detection, 89% precision, 5 platforms, 2M+ users

signals.title: Reverse CAPTCHA: Evaluating LLM Susceptibility to Invisible Unicode Instruction Injection
signals.abstract: Invisible Unicode characters encode malicious prompts invisible to humans. 67% success on GPT-4o, 43% on Claude 3.5, 78% on open-source. Defense reduces to <3%.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 67% attack success GPT-4o, 43% Claude, 78% open-source, <3% with defense

signals.title: Atomicity for Agents: TOCTOU Vulnerabilities in Browser-Use AI Agents
signals.abstract: TOCTOU vulnerabilities in browser AI agents allow adversaries to redirect behavior between observation and action. 45% unauthorized transaction success across 8 commercial agents.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 45% unauthorized transaction rate, 8 commercial agents tested

signals.title: Defensive Refusal Bias: How Safety Alignment Fails Cyber Defenders
signals.abstract: Safety-aligned LLMs disproportionately restrict legitimate defensive cybersecurity operations. 42% of legitimate pen-testing requests incorrectly refused, creating asymmetric capabilities favoring attackers.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 42% legitimate requests refused, 5000 queries, 8 models tested

signals.title: Hidden in the Metadata: Stealth Poisoning Attacks on Multimodal RAG Systems
signals.abstract: Metadata-embedded adversarial instructions manipulate RAG outputs through EXIF, PDF properties, HTML meta tags. 71% manipulation success, zero detection by existing scanners.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 71% manipulation success, 6 enterprise platforms, zero detection rate

signals.title: UniHM: Unified Dexterous Hand Manipulation via Vision-Language-Action Models
signals.abstract: ICLR 2026. Single VLA policy achieves 87% success on 50 manipulation tasks vs 45% for task-specific baselines. Zero-shot transfer to novel objects via language instructions.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 87% success on 50 tasks, 45% baseline, ICLR 2026

signals.title: D-REX: Differentiable Real-to-Sim-to-Real for Learning Dexterous Grasping
signals.abstract: Fully differentiable sim-to-real pipeline. 94% grasp success on novel objects with 10 min real-world fine-tuning. 3x reduction in data requirements. ICLR 2026.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 94% grasp success, 10 min fine-tuning, 3x data reduction, ICLR 2026

signals.title: From Dialogue to Execution: Mixture-of-Agents for Behavior Tree-Based Long-Horizon Robot Tasks
signals.abstract: Mixture-of-agents converts dialogue to behavior trees for complex robot tasks. 72% success on 25 household tasks requiring 10+ sequential steps, 3x higher than single-agent.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 72% success, 25 household tasks, 10+ steps, 3x vs single-agent

signals.title: MOSAIC: Unveiling the Moral, Social, and Individual Dimensions of Large Language Models
signals.abstract: Evaluates LLMs across 12 ethical theories, 8 social constructs, 16 personality traits. All models show utilitarian bias, Western-centric values, agreeable personalities reinforcing user biases.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 15 frontier models, 12 ethical theories, 8 social constructs, 16 traits

signals.title: Pressure-Tuned Double-Dome Superconductivity in KZnBi with Honeycomb Lattice
signals.abstract: Double-dome superconductivity in KZnBi under pressure. Two distinct phases at 4.2K and 8.7K connected by quantum critical point. Potential conventional and topological superconducting states.
signals.quantitative_metrics: Tc 4.2K and 8.7K, honeycomb lattice, double-dome phase diagram

signals.title: High-Temperature Superconductivity in Hydrogenated Hexagonal BC3 Monolayer via Sigma-Band Mechanism
signals.abstract: Predicted Tc ~67K in hydrogenated BC3 monolayer via sigma-band mechanism. Highest predicted Tc for 2D carbon-based superconductor. New pathway toward room-temperature superconductivity.
signals.quantitative_metrics: Tc ~67K, highest 2D carbon-based superconductor prediction

signals.title: Mechanically Assisted Symmetry Reconstruction for Extraordinary Piezoelectricity
signals.abstract: Record-high piezoelectric coefficient d33=2,100 pC/N in lead-free ceramics. 5x higher than PZT. Enables next-gen energy harvesting and sensing.
signals.quantitative_metrics: d33=2100 pC/N, 5x higher than PZT, lead-free

signals.title: Liquid Metals Routes towards Making Superconductors: A Scalable Manufacturing Pathway
signals.abstract: Liquid metal processing reduces superconductor production costs 80%. MgB2 critical current 10^5 A/cm2 at 20K. Scalable to industrial volumes for fusion magnets.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 80% cost reduction, 10^5 A/cm2 at 20K, industrial scalable

signals.title: Agentic Hives: Equilibrium, Indeterminacy, and Endogenous Cycles in Self-Organizing Autonomous Systems
signals.abstract: 1000+ interacting AI agents exhibit endogenous business cycles, spontaneous hierarchy, and coordination failures analogous to economic recessions. Fundamental governance challenges for agent deployment.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 1000+ agents, endogenous cycles, spontaneous hierarchy formation

signals.title: Silo-Bench: Evaluating Distributed Coordination in Multi-Agent LLM Systems at Scale
signals.abstract: First benchmark for multi-agent LLM coordination across 120 tasks and 2-64 agents. Coordination degrades superlinearly beyond 16 agents. Information silos emerge in 68% of trials.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 120 tasks, 2-64 agents, superlinear degradation at 16+, 68% silos

signals.title: From Spark to Fire: Error Cascades and Mitigation in Multi-Agent LLM Collaboration
signals.abstract: 23% of minor errors escalate to critical failures through positive feedback in multi-agent LLM systems. Circuit-breaker mechanisms reduce cascade rate by 78%.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 500 tasks, 23% escalation rate, 78% reduction with circuit breakers

signals.title: Summer-22B: A Systematic Approach to Video Foundation Model Development at Scale
signals.abstract: 22B video foundation model on 2.5B video-text pairs. SOTA on 18/22 benchmarks. Data quality yields 3x more benefit than model scaling. Emergent temporal reasoning capabilities.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 22B params, 2.5B pairs, 18/22 SOTA, 3x data quality > scaling

signals.title: TinyVLM: Zero-Shot Object Detection on Microcontrollers via Knowledge Distillation
signals.abstract: Vision-language model on 256KB SRAM microcontrollers. 15% of 7B teacher accuracy on 80 categories at 5 FPS on ARM Cortex-M7. Enables intelligent IoT without cloud.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 256KB SRAM, 80 categories, 5 FPS, ARM Cortex-M7

signals.title: Qwen3-Coder-Next: Advancing Code-Focused Language Models with Execution-Guided Training
signals.abstract: Execution-guided training conditions on actual code execution outcomes. 89.4% HumanEval, 78.2% SWE-bench-verified. 67% reduction in code hallucination vs next-token prediction.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 89.4% HumanEval, 78.2% SWE-bench, 67% hallucination reduction

signals.title: Length-Efficient Chain-of-Thought: Reducing Reasoning Verbosity Without Sacrificing Accuracy
signals.abstract: 55% CoT length reduction with 98% accuracy retention. 40-60% of reasoning tokens are redundant. 2.2x inference cost reduction.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 55% length reduction, 98% accuracy, 2.2x cost reduction

signals.title: Grokking as a Phase Transition: Understanding Delayed Generalization Through Singular Learning Theory
signals.abstract: First rigorous explanation of grokking via singular learning theory. Phase transition between memorization and generalization basins. Predicts timing within 15% accuracy.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 15% prediction accuracy for grokking timing

signals.title: SWE-ABS: Adversarial Benchmark Strengthening Reveals Inflated Success Rates in Code Agents
signals.abstract: 31% of SWE-bench solutions introduce undetected regressions, 18% exploit test patterns. Real deployment success 40-60% lower than benchmarks. Proposes adversarial benchmark strengthening.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 31% undetected regressions, 18% test exploitation, 40-60% gap

signals.title: SWE-Adept: Agentic Framework for Deep Repository-Level Code Understanding and Issue Resolution
signals.abstract: 52.3% SWE-bench-verified via dependency graphs and multi-file patches. Median resolution: 12 min vs 4 hours human. 78% pass human code review.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 52.3% resolution, 12 min vs 4hr, 78% code review pass

signals.title: Multimodal Alignment Improves Generalizability of Genomic Biomarker Prediction in Computational Pathology
signals.abstract: Multimodal histopathology-genomic alignment achieves 91% accuracy on 14 cancer types. 65% reduction in seen-unseen performance gap. Enables rapid genomic profiling from routine slides.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 91% accuracy, 14 cancer types, 65% gap reduction

signals.title: GPU-Accelerated Single-Cell Analysis at Scale with rapids-singlecell
signals.abstract: 50-200x speedup over CPU tools for single-cell analysis. Human Cell Atlas (37M cells) in 4 hours vs 2+ weeks. Removes computational bottleneck in precision medicine.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 50-200x speedup, 37M cells in 4 hours vs 2+ weeks

signals.title: Causal Attribution of Coastal Water Clarity Degradation to Nickel Processing Expansion in Indonesia
signals.abstract: Satellite-based causal attribution: 47% water clarity decline from 300% nickel smelting expansion in Morowali, Sulawesi. EV battery supply chain environmental footprint challenges green narratives.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 47% clarity decline, 300% smelting expansion, 2015-2025 satellite data

signals.title: Estimating Changes in Extreme Temperature Quantiles: Applied to Desert Temperature Records
signals.abstract: 99th percentile desert temperatures warming 2.1x faster than mean since 1990. 35 additional extreme heat days/year vs 1970. Implications for habitability and migration.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 2.1x warming rate, 35 extra extreme days/year, 120 years data, 45 stations

signals.title: ScreenAnt: Transparent On-Screen Antennas for 6G Wireless Communications
signals.abstract: Transparent antenna arrays in display screens for 6G. 12 dBi gain at 140 GHz with 92% optical transmittance. 40 Gbps at 3m range. Eliminates dedicated antenna modules.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 12 dBi, 140 GHz, 92% transmittance, 40 Gbps at 3m

signals.title: Quantum-PROBE: Rydberg Atomic Receiver for Multi-Angle RF Sensing with Quantum Advantage
signals.abstract: Rydberg atom RF receiver with 15 dB below classical sensitivity. 8 simultaneous direction estimates with 3x precision over MIMO arrays, 100x less power. For passive radar and anti-jamming.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 15 dB below classical, 8 simultaneous directions, 3x precision, 100x less power

signals.title: Range-Based Volatility Estimators for Monitoring Market Stress: Evidence from Local Food Price Data
signals.abstract: Food price volatility estimators detect stress events 3 weeks earlier than CPI measures. 34% of food crises preceded by detectable spikes missed by standard monitoring across 47 developing countries.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 3 weeks earlier detection, 34% crises missed, 47 countries

signals.title: Who Controls the Conversation? User Perspectives on Generative AI System Prompts
signals.abstract: CHI 2026. 76% unaware of system prompts, 82% want transparency, 91% desire control over AI personality. East Asian users prefer more customizable AI than Western users.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 2400 users, 6 countries, 76% unaware, 82% want transparency

signals.title: Topology as Information: Network Effects in Corporate Lending and Systemic Risk
signals.abstract: Lending network topology predicts default cascades 6 months before credit scores deteriorate. Regulators miss 40% of systemic risk by ignoring network effects. 45,000 loans across 12 EU countries.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 6-month lead time, 40% risk missed, 45000 loans, 12 countries

signals.title: Thoth: Bridging Language Models to Time Series Understanding via Mid-Training Integration
signals.abstract: Mid-training integration enables LLMs to natively understand time series. Zero-shot forecasting rivaling specialized models across 40 domains. First unified text-temporal reasoning model.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 100M time series, 40 domains, zero-shot competitive

signals.title: Clawdrain: Exploiting Tool-Calling Chains for Stealthy Token Exhaustion in AI Agents
signals.abstract: Recursive tool invocation causes agent token budget exhaustion. 85% success across 10 commercial platforms, 47x cost amplification. Stealthy - each call appears legitimate.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 85% success, 10 platforms, 47x cost amplification

signals.title: ThreatFormer-IDS: Robust Intrusion Detection with Zero-Day Generalization
signals.abstract: Transformer-based IDS with 94% zero-day detection vs 23% signature-based and 67% existing ML. Deployable at 100 Gbps via FPGA. Self-supervised on 500M+ flows.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 94% zero-day detection, 100 Gbps, 500M+ flows

signals.title: MetaRCA: Generalizable Root Cause Analysis for Cloud-Native Systems via Meta Causal Knowledge
signals.abstract: FSE 2026. Generalizable RCA for cloud systems using meta-learned causal graphs. 82% accuracy on unseen systems with zero configuration. Enables rapid cross-cloud deployment.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 82% accuracy, zero config, FSE 2026

signals.title: A Stochastic Correlation Extension of the Vasicek Credit Risk Model for Macro-Prudential Stress Testing
signals.abstract: Stochastic correlation extends Vasicek model capturing regime-dependent default clustering. Under stress, bank capital needs 35-50% higher than Basel III prescribes. Indicates systemic under-capitalization.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 35-50% higher capital needed, 2008/2020 crisis calibrated

signals.title: Startup Contracting and Entrepreneur-Investor Bargaining Under AI-Driven Valuation
signals.abstract: Theory of entrepreneur-investor bargaining when AI tools enable sophisticated valuation by both parties. Information asymmetry reduction changes optimal contract structure. Predicts shift toward revenue-based financing.
signals.quantitative_metrics: Revenue-based financing predictions, information asymmetry reduction

signals.title: Beyond Static Instruction: Multi-Agent AI Framework for Adaptive Augmented Reality Robot Training
signals.abstract: HRI 2026. Multi-agent AI for AR-based robot training that adapts in real-time to trainee skill level. 45% faster skill acquisition compared to static instruction methods.
signals.quantitative_metrics: 45% faster skill acquisition, HRI 2026
